titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the William Mishanec papers, 1953-1973
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.physdesc: Correspondence, bibliographic notes, studies, trials, reports, papers, employment history material and subject files.
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Includes correspondence, bibliographic notes, studies, trials, reports, papers, employment history material and subject files.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: William Mishanec was a plant breeder at the New York State Agricultural Experiment Station from 1953-1973.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, bibliographic notes, studies, trials, reports, papers, employment history material and subject files.

controlaccess.head: Subjects:
controlaccess.subject: Cornell University--Faculty.
New York State Agruicultural Experiment Station.
New York State Agricultural Experiment Station. Dept. of Horticultural Sciences.

emph.ref: Series II. Notes, Studies, Reports, Trials, Employment Files

did.unittitle: Series II. Notes, Studies, Reports, Trials, Employment Files

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William Mishanec Papers, #22-01-3401. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library.
